betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Burner§f

§aA 3×3×2 heat source that burns flammable fluids to generate TU.§f

The §bFluid Burner§f is placed under a crucible or other TU-hungry machine. Its copper heat plate must align with the receiving machine.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at Tier 2 anvil from: steel tanks ×4, steel pipes ×3, titanium ingots ×12, red copper ×8.

§6Operation§f:
§b• Fluid buffer§f: 16,000 mB of any flammable fluid
§b• TU buffer§f: 100,000 TU (stops burning when full)
§b• Rate§f: Adjustable 1–10 mB/t with a screwdriver (right-click to increase, sneak+right-click to decrease)
§b• Ports§f: 4 fluid ports on the lower block

§6Display§f:
Shows consumption (mB/t) and heat generation (TU/t) on the block itself without opening GUI.

§eTip§f: The fluid burner bridges the gap between solid-fuel fireboxes and electric heaters. Useful when you have excess flammable oil byproducts.
